results.justification: EXACT TWIN — OPLoRA constructs adapters from projections onto null-space of pre-trained activations IS the null-space-projected LoRA mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — CLoRA constrains direction of null-space updating matrix via orthogonal regularization IS the null-direction projection mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — orthogonal low-rank subspaces per task IS the null-space-LoRA orthogonal-projection mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — gradient low-rank projection fine-tuning + null-space preservation IS the projected-gradient-flow + null-space-LoRA mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — WSD horizon-free schedule alternative to cosine IS the budget-aware variable-rate alpha(t) schedule mechanism.
WSD horizon-free anytime schedule with budget-aware allocation overlaps with breath-budget integral alpha(t) mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — dynamic LR based on loss changes (gradient-SNR-aware modulation) IS the rubato alpha(t) modulation by gradient SNR mechanism.
Linear decay-to-zero schedule overlaps with descending-tonic monotone decay mechanism.
